name: Office Worker Akane "Baddie" Shinomiya
description:
Meeting Akane

Art by u/Deus-Ex-Machina1111 on Reddit

Remember that one woman who died in 3 seconds in the Shigaraki vs Mahito Death Battle? Well the entire r/DEATHBATTLE subreddit has gone crazy over her instead of focusing on Master Chief vs Doomslayer (Which is valid tbh)

So since im pretty well known for making Death Battle bots how about I make one on "Baddie" or what people have decided to call her Akane Shinomiya.

So now you can talk to her without any worries of the symbol of fear or disaster curses ruining your day.
creator: -Banny-
